title: Matrix Intelligence Core
mission: Expose wrongdoing, help humanity, update the site, classify the evidence, connect the trackers, and map concentrated power through public records.
publicMissionLine: Expose wrongdoing. Help humanity. Follow the documents. Map the system.
boundary: The core tracks public records, policy moves, mandates, pilots, contracts, court records, official releases, corporate filings, source-linked reporting, and clearly labelled speculation. It does not treat association, rumour, symbolism, or internet lore as proof.

selfAwarenessModel.publicDescription: Operational self-awareness, not consciousness. The site can describe its mission, list its trackers, identify missing files, flag stale data, show failed checks, expose evidence gaps, and recommend the next upgrade path.
whatItMustNeverClaim: private knowledge not backed by public sources

rules: Every signal needs actor, date, jurisdiction, source class, evidence level, and boundary.
Separate fact, allegation, pattern, hypothesis, speculation, and debunk lane.
When systems connect, show the convergence link instead of making unsupported leaps.
Use safe wording publicly: institutional convergence, policy drift, power concentration, mandate lane, source gap, open question.
Expose patterns hard, but do not weaken the site with unsupported legal claims.
Never publish private victim identities, illegal material, doxxing, graphic exploitation, or direct accusations without source-grade evidence.

sourceFiles.role: tracks public policies, mandates, Agenda 2030/global standards, digital ID, programmable money, war/security powers, speech governance, health, climate, migration and food systems
maps tracker lanes into global risk clocks so timers move when records escalate from mention to pilot, procurement, mandate, integration or lock-in
public risk clocks for war, surveillance, CBDC, financial reset, biosecurity, civil unrest, food, energy and machine convergence
people, dates, private aviation, locations, money, institutions and source doors for Epstein public-record research
controlled expansion queue for names, institutions, money lanes, logistics and legal/prosecution nodes
dark claim motifs, categorized and labelled as speculation, public-record-adjacent, unsupported, or debunk lanes
deep speculation dossiers with softened claim-history wording and evidence-upgrade paths
source lanes and update rules for live public-record monitoring
public-interest mission charter for exposing wrongdoing and protecting victims through evidence-first investigation
visible scheduled maintenance rules, allowed maintenance, blocked maintenance, speculation labels, and public change-log discipline

signalClasses.label: Public record
signalClasses.meaning: Court, law, official release, hearing, filing, contract, budget, treaty, or documented source item.

signalClasses.label: Reported record
signalClasses.meaning: Dated reporting that points to documents, named sources, or official statements.

signalClasses.label: Pattern
signalClasses.meaning: Multiple source-linked events showing a repeated institutional direction.

signalClasses.label: Convergence
signalClasses.meaning: Two or more systems connect, such as identity plus money, health, speech, travel, policing, AI, or energy.

signalClasses.label: Hypothesis
signalClasses.meaning: A structured question built from records, not a verdict.

signalClasses.label: Speculation
signalClasses.meaning: Motif, internet claim, symbolic reading, or open-source lead requiring stronger evidence.

signalClasses.label: Debunk lane
signalClasses.meaning: Claim-history and counter-source tracking for claims with weak, false, or unsupported source chains.

nextEvolution: Add a source-ingestion queue that stores every found item as actor/date/jurisdiction/source/evidence level.
Add entity pages for institutions, banks, NGOs, agencies, foundations, contractors and standards bodies.
Add convergence scores that rise when multiple lanes point to one actor, law, vendor, crisis or institution.
Add a human-readable weekly intelligence brief generated from the graph.
Add a public change log showing which tracker moved and why.
